class TryThrowNotCatch {
    void m() {
        try {
            if (bad()) {
                throw new IllegalStateException("guard");
            }
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log(e);
        }
    }

    boolean bad() {
        return false;
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}

    void log(Exception e) {}
}
